title: Somake Spells - Iron's Spells Addon
description: An addon for Iron's Spellbooks, with integration with Cataclysm, Born In Chaos and Companions compatibility. Inspired by T.O Magic 'n Extras.
body:
# Somake Spells

Welcome to **Somake Spells**, a mod developed for update 1.21.1 of the **SSMP Somake Network** server.

This project was primarily inspired by T.O. Magic 'n Extras, as it was one of the main mods of Season 3 on the server while it was on version 1.20.1.

## What does the mod add?
* **Spells:** Over 50 new spells, from the elements **Lightning**, **Fire**, **Aqua**, **Symmetry**, 1 **Blood** and 1 **Ender**. Also includes 1 "charge" of each element (including other addons, such as **Sound**, **Symmetry**, **Spirit** and **Geo**).

* **Aqua School of Magic:** The mod introduces the Aqua element, bringing a variety of spells with an aquatic theme.

* **New Equipment:** Adds some weapons that are not yet crafted, such as **Glacium Greataxe**, **Core Splitter**, **Witherite Glaive**, **Ruined Blade**, **Clef Sword**, **Rock Sword** and **Hollow Sword**.

* Armor: Adds some armors that are not yet crafted, such as **Dark Metal Battlemage**, **Ceranium Armor**, **Aquamancer Armor**, and **Abyssium Armor**.

* Grimoires: Spellbooks with evolution for all elements, including other add-ons that add elements.

## Adjustments and Settings

* **Charge Effect Change:** The mod modifies the "Charge" effect of Iron's Spells to grant Lightning Magic Power instead of generic power and speed. This change is made for better integration with the other elemental "charges" that other spells add, but this is configurable and can be disabled if you prefer the original functionality.

## Compatibility

Somake Spells was created with integration with other mods in mind. It offers support and compatibility (whether with items, spells, or mechanics) for:

* Magic from the East (Required)
* L_Ender's Cataclysm (Required)
* Born in Chaos (Required)
* Apothic Attributes (Required)
* Geomancy Plus (Optional)
* Alshanex's Familiars (Optional)
* Companions Mod (Optional)

## Note about the Aqua Element

The Aqua element and its spells were created specifically to address its absence in version 1.21.1. If the **T.O. Magic 'n Extras** mod officially updates to this version, all Aqua-related content will be migrated to it.

## Links

* **Official Modpack:** [Somake Network on CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/somake-network)
